description_long: This is a rectangular football field with a lush green artificial turf surface, marked with crisp white lines that define the boundaries, center circle, penalty areas, and goal boxes. At each end of the field, there are two standard-sized goal posts with nets, positioned symmetrically. The field features a clearly defined center circle and halfway line, as well as penalty spots and rectangular penalty areas at both ends. The surface appears even and well-maintained, suitable for professional or recreational play. The field lacks visible spectator stands or additional structures, emphasizing its function as a playing surface. The overall design is minimalistic, focusing on the essential elements required for a regulation football match.
description: A rectangular green football field with white markings, standard goal posts at both ends, and a clearly defined center circle and penalty areas. The surface is flat and well-marked, suitable for regulation play.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the football field from a low, wide angle, highlighting the length of the field and both goal posts at the far ends.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the field from an overhead end-on perspective, emphasizing the goal area and penalty markings at one end.
description_view_2: View 2 mirrors View 0, showing the opposite lengthwise perspective with both goals visible.
description_view_3: View 3 is similar to View 1 but from the opposite end, focusing on the other goal area and penalty markings.
